_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

project_hel_toggle.description: Add Project_Hel's levels and collectibles in the pool (need Hel Memory X to access level X)

sensory_boost_from_start.description: Start the game with the Sensory Boost ability.

description: Start the game with all Cyberpasses.
You still need the other levels requirements
Start the game with x number of abilities (Blink, Tempest, Surge, Overlord).
